- Yellow bucket (Y) at bottom.
- Four buttons at the bottom (row 42 caps, row 45 stems).
- Blue circle (b) at (55, 36).
- Goal: Move yellow block into yellow bucket.
Plan:

2. If that doesn't work, re-evaluate button interactions or look for other clues.
